welcome.body: SEKAR needs a bit of setup so you can get straight to the field. Just a moment, only once.

permissions.title: Give access to your phone
permissions.subtitle: All permissions below are required for tracking and reporting to work fully.

permissionModal.info: We need these permissions to provide the best experience when using the SEKAR app.
permissionModal.notificationsDesc: Receive important notifications about new tasks, shift reminders, and information from your supervisor.
permissionModal.locationDesc: Required for digital attendance and to verify you are at the correct work location when clocking in.
permissionModal.backgroundLocationDesc: Allow "All the time" to track your route during work shifts. This data helps your supervisor monitor completed areas.
permissionModal.cameraDesc: Required to take work report photos. Photos help your supervisor verify completed work.
permissionModal.galleryDesc: Required to select photos from gallery when completing reports or submitting pruning requests.
permissionModal.androidNote:
IMPORTANT:
1. Select "Allow all the time" or "Allow all the time"
2. If the option doesn't appear, open Settings → Apps → SEKAR → Permissions → Location
3. Select "All the time" or "Allow all the time"

clockable.title: Your work area
clockable.body: Your work area has been set. Tap Start Working to open the dashboard.

kecamatan.title: Ready to submit requests?
kecamatan.body: Open your district request list and submit new requests whenever needed.

admin.title: Ready to start?
admin.body: Dashboard shows team summary and pending requests.
